hero.headline: I build products that <accent>work</accent> — and look like it.
hero.subheadline: Full-stack developer, UI/UX designer, and AI consultant helping ambitious teams ship exceptional digital products.

blog.label: The blog
blog.title: Thinking out loud

cta_section.title: Ready to build something great?
cta_section.subtitle: I'm currently accepting new projects. Let's talk about what you're building and how I can help.

about.title: About me
about.bio: I'm Pouya Karimi — a freelance developer and consultant based in Iran, working with clients worldwide. I bridge the gap between design and engineering, helping teams ship products they're proud of.
about.story: I started coding at 16 and never stopped. Over the years I've worked across every layer of the stack — from pixel-perfect UIs to database design and cloud infrastructure. I thrive at the intersection of product, design, and engineering.

values.title: Craft over speed
values.description: Quality compounds. Thoughtful, well-written work creates fewer bugs, happier users, and lower maintenance costs.

values.title: Clarity in communication
values.description: Good work requires good communication. I keep clients informed, ask the right questions, and document my decisions.

values.title: Full ownership
values.description: I treat your project like mine. I think about the bigger picture, flag risks early, and care about outcomes — not just deliverables.

values.title: Always learning
values.description: The best developers are perpetually curious. I invest in staying sharp across design, engineering, and product.

services_page.title: Services
services_page.subtitle: I work with startups, scale-ups, and established companies — adapting to your team's size, rhythm, and goals.

items.title: Web Development
items.description: Performant, scalable web applications built with modern stacks.
items.for: Startups and teams that need to move fast without breaking things.

items.title: UI/UX Design
items.description: Interfaces that convert — because good design is good business.
items.for: Companies that want a design edge over their competition.

items.title: AI & Automation
items.description: Integrate AI into your product or workflows intelligently.
items.for: Teams ready to leverage AI beyond basic chatbot features.

items.title: Technical Consulting
items.description: Strategic technical guidance for leadership and growing teams.
items.for: Founders and CTOs who need a trusted technical partner.

process.title: Discover
process.description: We start with a deep-dive into your goals, constraints, and users. I ask a lot of questions — that's where the good work begins.

process.title: Design
process.description: From wireframes to polished mockups, I design with real content and real constraints — no lorem ipsum, no generic templates.

process.title: Build
process.description: Clean, maintainable code with weekly check-ins. You see progress every step of the way — no black-box development.

process.title: Launch & support
process.description: I help with deployment, QA, and post-launch polish. Available for ongoing support and retainers.

faq.q: How long do projects typically take?
faq.a: It depends on scope. A focused landing page: 1–2 weeks. A full SaaS MVP: 6–12 weeks. I provide detailed estimates after an initial call.
Yes — I work fully remote and collaborate with clients across Europe, the Middle East, and North America. Time zones have never been a barrier.
I work on a project-based or hourly basis, depending on what fits your needs. I'll propose the right model after understanding your project.
Absolutely. I sign NDAs as a matter of course. Your ideas and data stay confidential.

contact.title: Let's work together
contact.subtitle: Have a project in mind? I'd love to hear about it. Fill out the form and I'll get back to you within 24 hours.

form.name: Your name
form.message_placeholder: What are you building? What's the timeline? Any relevant context...
form.success: Message sent! I'll reply within 24 hours.
form.error: Something went wrong. Please try again or email me directly.
